== Fields

=== `delimiter`

The delimiter to split the string by.

*Type*: `string`

*Default*: `
`

=== `emit_bytes`

When true, the output will be bloblang bytes instead of strings.

*Type*: `bool`

*Default*: `false`

=== `empty_as_null`

When true, empty strings resulting from the split are converted to null.

*Type*: `bool`

*Default*: `false`
